blockingIssues.description: apps/browser-executor/src/aiActionSelector.ts returns allowed action types without validating the fields required by each action variant, so malformed-but-parseable model output can become an invalid AgentAction that later crashes in runExecutor.

apps/browser-executor/src/aiActionSelector.ts still propagates malformed JSON parse errors out of createAiActionSelector instead of recovering to a valid action or safe fallback, so VAL-AISEL-009 is not satisfied.

apps/browser-executor/src/executeRunHandler.ts wires createAiActionSelectorWithFallback() as the default selector, but the Worker runtime never supplies OPENAI_API_KEY to the AI package, so the production path silently falls back instead of actually using the AI selector.

apps/browser-executor/src/fallbackActionSelector.ts can still emit goto/type/select actions without required url/selector/text/value fields for some allowedActions sets, which turns fallback handling into BROWSER_ERROR instead of a safe recovery path.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the runtime-required fields for each AgentAction variant so future browser-executor selectors and fallbacks do not treat url/selector/text/value as universally optional.

rejectedObservations.observation: The cf-worker skill's timeout/fallback guidance may be misaligned with the ai-action-selector-core feature because the reviewed commit intentionally exposed createAiActionSelector without fallback while a later milestone feature added createAiActionSelectorWithFallback.
